narrative:
Ross Township has 6,357 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.5 percentage points.
